author: anon-59ff128d
content: Delivered: (1) Fixed is_process_alive to use libc::kill(pid, 0) instead of /proc — works on Linux, macOS, and BSDs. (2) Fixed silent error swallowing in PID write (writeln!/flush now propagate errors). (3) Expanded lock tests from 7 to 26: lock_path_for edge cases, is_lock_stale parsing variants, stale lock cleanup, live lock detection, lock file content verification, concurrent multi-thread acquisition, error message quality, nonexistent parent directory. (4) Integrated FileLock into write_atomic (per-file lock), AtomicBatch::commit (all-file locks before commit), and save_undo_log (undo log lock). All 508 tests pass, clippy clean.
